reviews.review_description: I completed it. I complete it but I was stuck on the  are putting those cabinets. good ￼ game
It fun and easy to understand how to build home.
I am an architect and this game fits me perfectly me and my team love it.

This was a really good game and I just loved a lot about it!

One of the things that I didn't like is that there isn't other houses to build and there is only one of them but other than that it is a pretty good game!

I'm really looking forward to other levels/houses to build! and, I will suggest some features that I think would be cool below.

Feature 1: after finishing a house you get to go into the house and walk around in it.

Feature 2: a gallery for things like houses you already completed.

Feature 3: it would be pretty cool to have a painting or customizing mode where you can customize and paint a house that you made and finished by going into that mode in feature 1 and selecting the painbrush mode also with other various tools like a furninture mode and a props mode with props you can pick up to customize your house.

Feature 4: being able to invite your friends to a "room" where you can chill in the host of the room's houses and being able to hang out and stuff.

I really did love this game and I wad devastated to see that there was only one hose to make and I am exited for if you, the dev(s) make more levels and take the suggestions for an idea for a huge update or maybe smaller more frequent updates!

I give four stars because of the lack of levels/houses to make and see but once you make some updates it will be a 5 star for sure!
I love this game so helpful and knowledgeable hope updates come as well. Maybe a remodeling game is in the future

Positive:
Very instructive. Go over the basic how to build a sfr.

Negative:
No quit button found
this is a good app to help people understand the basics of how a house is built.
